login.browserDescription: We opened Accounts in your browser so security checks can complete. Sign in there — this app will continue automatically when you return.
login.timeoutDescription: Accounts did not finish signing you in. Open Accounts in your browser again, or try silent sign-in.

auth.failedDescription: We could not validate your session. Please try signing in again.

updater.installed: Version {{version}} installed. Restart to finish updating.

home.tagline: See how your operations connect — shipping, fulfillment, payments, and banking in one network.
home.exploreHint: Drag to pan, click a building to explore
home.sceneLabel: Live logistics world — trucks, planes and packages moving between your operations

truck.label: Delivery truck
truck.pitch: Trucks move goods between cargo, fulfillment, and your customers across the network.

plane.label: Air freight
plane.pitch: Planes carry express and international shipments between hubs.

package.label: Package flow
package.pitch: Packages stream through fulfillment conveyors and API-driven order pipelines.

forklift.label: Warehouse forklift
forklift.pitch: Forklifts keep inventory moving inside the fulfillment center.

envia-shipping.label: Shipping
envia-shipping.pitch: Compare rates across 100+ carriers, print labels in one click, and track local, domestic, and international packages from a single dashboard.

envia-cargo.label: Cargo
envia-cargo.pitch: Get instant full-truckload quotes with dedicated equipment across the US, Mexico, and Canada — GPS tracking and cross-border compliance included.

envia-fulfillment.label: Fulfillment
envia-fulfillment.pitch: We store, pick, pack, and ship your orders from a secure fulfillment network — synced to 30+ ecommerce platforms with real-time inventory.

envia-returns.label: Returns
envia-returns.pitch: Turn returns into a loyalty moment — self-serve RMAs, store integrations, and reverse logistics that cut cost and keep every case in one place.

ecart-pay.label: Payments
ecart-pay.pitch: Accept cards, payment links, subscriptions, MSI, and direct debit on one CNBV-registered platform — online checkout and in-store terminals.

ecart-banking.label: Banking
ecart-banking.pitch: Pull provider CFDIs from the SAT, approve payables, and settle by SPEI — company wallets, batch payouts, and a full audit trail.

ecart-api.label: API
ecart-api.pitch: One unified commerce API for 40+ carts and marketplaces — sync products, orders, inventory, and customers without building each platform yourself.

parapaquetes.label: Supplies
parapaquetes.pitch: Wholesale boxes, mailers, tape, and packing materials that every carrier accepts — volume pricing and nationwide shipping across Mexico.

tendencys-partners.label: Partners
tendencys-partners.pitch: Sell eight Tendencys products from one portal — recurring commissions from your first referral, ready-to-pitch materials, and monthly prizes.

developers.title: Developers & APIs
developers.subtitle: Documentation and API access for Tendencys products. Live surfaces open docs in your browser or jump into the product to manage keys.

envia-shipping.name: Envia Shipping API
envia-shipping.blurb: Quotes, labels, tracking, and webhooks for 100+ carriers.

ecart-api.name: Ecart API
ecart-api.blurb: Connect stores and marketplaces through one commerce API.

envia-cargo.name: Envia Cargo API
envia-cargo.blurb: Programmatic freight booking and load management.

envia-fulfillment.name: Envia Fulfillment API
envia-fulfillment.blurb: Inventory, orders, and warehouse operations via API.

envia-returns.name: Envia Returns API
envia-returns.blurb: Automate return labels and reverse logistics.

ecart-pay.name: Ecart Pay API
ecart-pay.blurb: Payments, links, and subscriptions for your checkout.

ecart-banking.name: Ecart Banking API
ecart-banking.blurb: Company finances, payouts, and invoice automation.

welcome.title: Every tool you need to power your business
welcome.subtitle: Shipping, fulfillment, payments and banking — trusted by 20,000+ companies in 10+ countries.
welcome.secureNote: Sign-in opens in your browser so security checks can complete, then returns you to Tendencys.
welcome.showcaseTagline: One login. Every tool to run your business.

showcase.envia-cargo: Full-truckload and LTL freight across one network
showcase.envia-fulfillment: Orders processed and shipped in under 24h
showcase.envia-returns: Returns handled through the same fulfillment network
showcase.ecart-pay: The safest way to get paid, anywhere
showcase.ecart-banking: Manage your business finances in one place
showcase.parapaquetes: Packaging and supplies at wholesale pricing

settings.title: Desktop settings
settings.subtitle: Choose how each product prints and saves labels inside Tendencys Desktop.
settings.productHint: These options apply only inside the desktop app — not in the browser.
settings.labelPrintModeHelp: Used when a product asks to print a label PDF.

instant.label: Instant print
instant.description: Send straight to the printer below — no system dialog.

system.label: System viewer
system.description: Open the PDF in your default viewer so you can print from there.

save.label: Save only
save.description: Always download the file to Downloads instead of printing.

settings.labelPrinterHelp: Used for Instant print. Leave as system default to use the OS default printer.
settings.printersError: Could not list printers on this computer.

webView.launcherDescription: Sign-in cookies live in your system browser. Sign in to this service, then use Open in browser for full access.
webView.launcherOpenedDescription: Opened in browser — sign-in cookies live there. Use Open in browser again anytime, or show an optional in-app preview.
webView.previewBanner: Preview only — product sessions live in your browser.
webView.previewBlockedHint: This service blocked in-app embedding. Keep using the browser.
webView.blockedDescription: This service cannot be displayed inside the app due to security restrictions. Sign in via Accounts in your browser, then open the service there.
webView.loadErrorDescription: The service did not respond. Retry, or open it in your browser.
